ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
function decodeSeries(url){
  var m = String(url||'').match(/(?:\?|&)crazy_series=([^&]+)/);
  if(!m) return '';
  try { return decodeURIComponent(m[1].replace(/\+/g,' ')); } catch(e){ return m[1]; }
}
var series = decodeSeries(baseUrl) || decodeSeries(book.bookUrl) || '';
if(!series && book.name) series = String(book.name);
if(series){
  java.put('series', series);
  book.variable = JSON.stringify({series: series});
  // 拉一页用于简介/最新章
  var api = 'https://www.crazyhome2000.com/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?search=' + encodeURIComponent(series) + '&per_page=20&orderby=date&order=desc&_fields=id,date,link,title,excerpt';
  var raw = '';
  try { raw = String(java.ajax(api) || '[]'); } catch(e){ raw='[]'; }
  var arr=[]; try{ arr=JSON.parse(raw);}catch(e2){arr=[];}
  function cleanTitle(t){
    t=String(t||'').replace(/<[^>]+>/g,'').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/–/g,'-').replace(/ /g,' ');
    return t.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();
  }
  function parseSeries(title){
    var t=cleanTitle(title);
    var m=t.match(/^(.*?)[\s\-—_]*(\d{1,5})\s*[-~～—–到至]\s*(\d{1,5})\s*$/);
    if(m) return {name:m[1].trim(), start:+m[2], end:+m[3]};
    m=t.match(/^(.*?)[\s\-—_]+(\d{1,5})\s*$/);
    if(m) return {name:m[1].trim(), start:+m[2], end:+m[2]};
    return {name:t, start:null, end:null};
  }
  var parts=[];
  for(var i=0;i<arr.length;i++){
    var p=arr[i]; var meta=parseSeries(p.title && p.title.rendered);
    if(meta.name !== series) continue;
    parts.push({start: meta.start==null?1e9:meta.start, end: meta.end==null?1e9:meta.end, title: cleanTitle(p.title.rendered), excerpt: cleanTitle((p.excerpt&&p.excerpt.rendered)||'')});
  }
  parts.sort(function(a,b){return a.start-b.start || a.end-b.end;});
  var latest = parts.length? parts[parts.length-1].title : series;
  var intro = parts.length? (parts[0].excerpt || ('共'+parts.length+'个章节块')) : '';
  result = {name: series, author: '狂人之家书屋', kind: '系列聚合', lastChapter: latest, intro: intro, wordCount: String((parts.length||0))+'块', coverUrl: 'https://www.crazyhome2000.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/icon.jpg'};
} else {
  result = {name: book.name||'', author:'', kind:'', lastChapter:'', intro:'', wordCount:'', coverUrl:''};
}
</js>
ruleBookInfo.name: name
ruleBookInfo.author: author

ruleExplore.bookList:
function cleanTitle(t){ t=String(t||'').replace(/<[^>]+>/g,'').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/–/g,'-').replace(/ /g,' '); return t.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); } function parseSeries(title){ var t=cleanTitle(title); var m=t.match(/^(.*?)[\s\-—_]*(\d{1,5})\s*[-~～—–到至]\s*(\d{1,5})\s*$/); if(m) return {name:m[1].trim(), start:+m[2], end:+m[3]}; m=t.match(/^(.*?)[\s\-—_]+(\d{1,5})\s*$/); if(m) return {name:m[1].trim(), start:+m[2], end:+m[2]}; return {name:t, start:null, end:null}; } function getParam(url, key){ var m = String(url||'').match(new RegExp('[?&]'+key+'=([^&]+)')); if(!m) return ''; try { return decodeURIComponent(m[1]); } catch(e){ return m[1]; } } var catId = getParam(baseUrl, 'crazy_cat'); var page = parseInt(getParam(baseUrl, 'crazy_page') || '1', 10); if(!page || page < 1) page = 1; if(!catId){ var slugMap = { '%e7%8e%84%e5%b9%bb%e4%b8%96%e7%95%8c': '159', '%e9%83%bd%e5%b8%82%e7%94%9f%e6%b4%bb': '2', '%e5%ae%b6%e5%ba%ad%e4%bc%a6%e7%90%86': '80', '%e7%ba%a2%e6%9d%8f%e5%87%ba%e5%a2%99': '1', '%e5%8f%a4%e9%a3%8e%e5%b0%8f%e8%af%b4': '317', '%e6%a0%a1%e5%9b%ad%e5%b8%88%e7%94%9f': '16', '%e6%9a%b4%e8%99%90%e4%b8%96%e7%95%8c': '47', '%e6%91%84%e5%bf%83': '444', '%e6%b5%aa%e6%bc%ab%e7%ba%af%e7%88%b1': '258', '%e4%b9%a1%e6%9d%91%e9%87%8e%e8%b6%a3': '318' }; var path = String(baseUrl); for(var k in slugMap){ if(path.indexOf(k)>=0){ catId = slugMap[k]; break; } } } if(!catId){ java.log('explore missing catId baseUrl=' + baseUrl); result = ''; } else { var api = 'https://www.crazyhome2000.com/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?categories=' + catId + '&page=' + page + '&per_page=50&orderby=date&order=desc&_fields=id,date,link,title,excerpt'; var raw = ''; try { raw = String(java.ajax(api) || ''); } catch(e){ raw=''; } java.log('explore cat=' + catId + ' page=' + page + ' rawLen=' + raw.length); var arr = []; try { arr = JSON.parse(raw); } catch(e2){ arr = []; } var map = {}; for(var i=0;i<(arr?arr.length:0);i++){ var p = arr[i] || {}; var titleObj = p.title; var title = ''; if(titleObj && titleObj.rendered != null) title = titleObj.rendered; else if(typeof titleObj === 'string') title = titleObj; title = cleanTitle(title); if(!title) continue; var meta = parseSeries(title); var name = meta.name || title; if(!map[name]){ map[name] = {name:name, count:0, last:title, intro:cleanTitle((p.excerpt && p.excerpt.rendered)||''), end: meta.end}; } map[name].count++; if(meta.end != null){ if(map[name].end == null || meta.end > map[name].end){ map[name].end = meta.end; map[name].last = title; } } else { map[name].last = title; } } var keys = Object.keys(map); var html = ''; for(var j=0;j'+b.name+'' + '狂人之家书屋' + ''+b.last+'' + '

本页约 '+b.count+' 块；点进后拉全书目录

' + '\n'; } java.log('explore seriesCount=' + keys.length); result = html; } @css:div.item
ruleExplore.name: tag.a.name@text

ruleSearch.bookList:
function getQuery(){ var q=''; try{ var m=String(baseUrl).match(/(?:\?|&)s=([^&]+)/); if(m) q=decodeURIComponent(m[1].replace(/\+/g,' ')); }catch(e){} if(!q){ try{q=String(key||'');}catch(e2){} } return q; } function cleanTitle(t){ t=String(t||'').replace(/<[^>]+>/g,'').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/–/g,'-').replace(/ /g,' '); return t.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); } function parseSeries(title){ var t=cleanTitle(title); var m=t.match(/^(.*?)[\s\-—_]*(\d{1,5})\s*[-~～—–到至]\s*(\d{1,5})\s*$/); if(m) return {name:m[1].trim(), start:+m[2], end:+m[3]}; m=t.match(/^(.*?)[\s\-—_]+(\d{1,5})\s*$/); if(m) return {name:m[1].trim(), start:+m[2], end:+m[2]}; return {name:t, start:null, end:null}; } function ajax(url){ try{ return String(java.ajax(url)||''); }catch(e){ return ''; } } var q=getQuery(); if(!q){ java.log('search key empty'); result=''; } else{ var map={}; var maxPages=5; for(var page=1; page<=maxPages; page++){ var api='https://www.crazyhome2000.com/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?search='+encodeURIComponent(q)+'&per_page=100&page='+page+'&_fields=id,date,link,title,excerpt'; var raw=ajax(api); if(!raw) break; var arr=[]; try{arr=JSON.parse(raw);}catch(e){arr=[];} if(!arr.length) break; for(var i=0;i=2 && name.indexOf(q)<0 && title.indexOf(q)<0) continue; if(!map[name]){ map[name]={name:name, count:0, min:1e9, max:-1, last:title, intro:cleanTitle((p.excerpt&&p.excerpt.rendered)||''), ids:{}}; } if(map[name].ids[p.id]) continue; map[name].ids[p.id]=1; map[name].count++; if(meta.start!=null && meta.startmap[name].max){ map[name].max=meta.end; map[name].last=title; } } if(arr.length<100) break; } var keys=Object.keys(map); // 结果多时优先：系列名包含关键词、块数多 keys.sort(function(a,b){ var A=map[a], B=map[b]; var as=A.name.indexOf(q)>=0?1:0, bs=B.name.indexOf(q)>=0?1:0; if(as!=bs) return bs-as; return B.count-A.count; }); var html=''; for(var k=0;k=0 && b.min<1e9)? (b.min+'-'+b.max) : ''; html += '
' + ''+b.name+'' + '狂人之家书屋' + ''+b.count+'块'+(range?(' · '+range):'')+'' + ''+b.last+'' + '

'+(b.intro||'')+'

' + '
\n'; } java.log('search q='+q+' series='+keys.length); result=html; } @css:div.item

ruleToc.chapterList: function getSeries(){ var s=java.get('series'); if(s) return String(s); if(book.variable){ try{ s=JSON.parse(String(book.variable)).series; if(s) return String(s);}catch(e){} } var m=String(book.bookUrl||baseUrl||'').match(/(?:\?|&)crazy_series=([^&]+)/); if(m){ try{return decodeURIComponent(m[1].replace(/\+/g,' '));}catch(e2){return m[1];} } return String(book.name||''); } function cleanTitle(t){ t=String(t||'').replace(/<[^>]+>/g,'').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/–/g,'-').replace(/ /g,' '); return t.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); } function parseSeries(title){ var t=cleanTitle(title); var m=t.match(/^(.*?)[\s\-—_]*(\d{1,5})\s*[-~～—–到至]\s*(\d{1,5})\s*$/); if(m) return {name:m[1].trim(), start:+m[2], end:+m[3]}; m=t.match(/^(.*?)[\s\-—_]+(\d{1,5})\s*$/); if(m) return {name:m[1].trim(), start:+m[2], end:+m[2]}; return {name:t, start:null, end:null}; } var series=getSeries(); if(!series) throw '缺少系列名 series'; java.put('series', series); book.variable=JSON.stringify({series:series}); var parts=[]; var seen={}; for(var page=1; page<=10; page++){ var api='https://www.crazyhome2000.com/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?search='+encodeURIComponent(series)+'&per_page=100&page='+page+'&_fields=id,date,link,title'; var raw=''; try{ raw=String(java.ajax(api)||''); }catch(e){ raw=''; } if(!raw) break; var arr=[]; try{arr=JSON.parse(raw);}catch(e2){arr=[];} if(!arr.length) break; for(var i=0;i'+name+'\n'; } java.log('toc series='+series+' chapters='+parts.length); if(!parts.length) throw '未聚合到章节，可换更完整书名重搜'; result=html; @css:a
